---
title: "Part III: Mini thesis based on Quarto + R/Python"
format: html
---

## Oskar Pettersson, Andreas Moen, Philip Jacobsen

---
abstract: |
Create a Quarto Project Web Site and Style Your Quarto Document for Various Output Formats
---

---
keywords: 
  - Quarto formating
  - Gretl
  - RStudio webpage 
---






##Conclusion
